manifest.title: Battery
manifest.defaultDescription: Battery marks the electronics stage of the building track.
manifest.description: Battery brings portable power onto the building track.

Style: polished holographic sci-fi prop render, fabrication achievement, maker prestige, forged sci-fi craftsmanship, collectible game achievement art, clean high-contrast silhouette, premium materials, subtle bevels, luminous edge lighting, restrained reflections, elegant futuristic finish. Composition: one centered object only, large in frame, isolated on a dark transparent background, no container, no scene, no additional props, no decorative frame. Color direction: warm editorial energy with electric amber, signal gold, coral, vermilion, and hot magenta accents; reduce cyan/teal dominance; keep deep navy shadows for contrast. Add a subtle electric circuit and neuro-tech motif integrated into the object itself: luminous circuit traces, synaptic node glows, neural-interface filigree, and signal-routing lines embedded along contours rather than floating as separate props. Rendering notes: object should feel dimensional and cool, but still simple enough to read inside a badge shell; emphasize iconic shape first, surface detail second.

Style: polished holographic sci-fi prop render, fabrication achievement, maker prestige, forged sci-fi craftsmanship, collectible game achievement art, clean high-contrast silhouette, premium materials, subtle bevels, luminous edge lighting, restrained reflections, elegant futuristic finish. Composition: one centered object only, large in frame, isolated on a dark transparent background, no container, no scene, no additional props, no decorative frame. Color direction: warm editorial energy with electric amber, signal gold, coral, vermilion, and hot magenta accents; reduce cyan/teal dominance; keep deep navy shadows for contrast. Add a subtle electric circuit and neuro-tech motif integrated into the object itself: luminous circuit traces, synaptic node glows, neural-interface filigree, and signal-routing lines embedded along contours rather than floating as separate props. Rendering notes: object should feel dimensional and cool, but still simple enough to read inside a badge shell; emphasize iconic shape first, surface detail second.
